title: 重申！冇警察比人打！市民係制服一名恐怖分子

replies.msg:
7月14晚一批懷疑冒充香港警察嘅恐怖分子衝入沙田新城市廣場，現場市民英勇抗敵，成功制服一名疑似恐怖分子。
該批人士穿着整套香港警察防暴裝備，但沒有任內委任証，更用上反光膠紙、反光鏡遮蔽樣貌。於突然衝入新城市廣場毆打平民，製造混亂。一批市民聯手制服其中一名恐怖分子

7月14晚在沙田新城市廣場

一批懷疑冒充香港警察的恐怖分子衝入沙田新城市廣場擾亂社會安寧。該批人士穿着整套香港警察防暴裝備，但沒有委任証，更用上反光膠紙、反光鏡遮蔽樣貌。

他們衝入廣場後，肆意毆打現場消費者，場面十分混亂。現場幸有市民英勇抗暴，嘗試聯手制服一名疑似恐怖分子，保護身邊人的安全。

replies.msg:
A group of suspected terrorists, equipped with Hong Kong Police costumes, attacked Shatin New Town City. One of the terrorist has been subdued by HK citizens.

14th Jul, 2019, at around 2130, a group of terrorists, who have equipped with Hong Kong Polices costumes but with no police ID no. printed nor demonstrating any warrant cards to the public, rushed into Shatin New Town City Plaza and punched the citizens. One of the terrorist tried to smash the stores and killed the citizens was later on being subdued by a group of brave HK citizens.

This group of terrorists have caused the tension of recents peaceful demonstrations by the HK citizens. They are usually equipped with Hong Kong police costumes and tended to incur a mess during the demonstration. However, the government seems have no plan on stopping the terrorists. Head of Hong Kong Police Lo Wai Chung has been disappeared over weeks. It is highly suspected he has been kidnapped by the terrorist.
